sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-quantized integer matrix converter using Q15 scale, zero-point addition, rounding, and saturation.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational quantized integer GEMM datapath that subtracts zero-points and accumulates INT32 dot products.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational INT32 accumulator dequantizer that multiplies by Q15 scale_A and scale_B and emits packed FP32 results.
